name: Create Charlotte's Web Reading Comprehension Guide Flipchart
description: A 3rd grade language arts teacher needs a reading comprehension guide for Charlotte's Web by E.B. White. Create a 4-page flipchart. Page 1 is a title page with 'Charlotte's Web' as the main title, 'By E.B. White' as the subtitle, and a line for 'Name: ___________'. Page 2 is titled 'Comprehension Questions' and contains at least three numbered questions about the story. Page 3 is titled 'Character Analysis' and features a labeled rectangle box for each of the three main characters (Wilbur, Charlotte, and Fern) with their names visible as text. Page 4 is titled 'Theme and Message' and includes text prompts about the book's theme and lesson. Login as ga / password123 and save the completed flipchart to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/charlottes_web_guide.flipchart.
